modeDefinitions.description: Run in order because the task defines shared contracts or must wait for previous work.
May run in a declared parallel group after dependencies are complete.
Integrates and validates all work from one parallel group.
Performs audit, evidence, final coverage, or review work without implementation.

phases.title: Foundation
exitCriteria: Shared contracts are complete before feature work starts.

phases.title: Independent feature implementation

forbiddenChanges: auth, permission, migration, payment, deployment, billing, or secret changes

exitCriteria: All parallel group tasks and their integration task are complete.

phases.title: Integration and validation
exitCriteria: Integration validation passes or records a stop condition.

phases.title: Final validation and review
exitCriteria: Final coverage and result review are ready.

forbiddenChanges: auth, permission, migration, payment, deployment, billing, or secret changes

parallelizationRules: Only active Cycle Slice nodes may become execution tasks.
Excluded, deferred, blocked, and out-of-scope nodes are protected scope.
Touching protected scope requires a Change Node or a new approved cycle.
Dependencies must be complete before group start.
Expected files must not overlap inside the group.
Unknown file-touch risk must be none or low.
Shared contracts must be completed as foundation work.
Every parallel group must have an integration task.
Every parallel group must require integration evidence and integration pass.
parallelizationForbidden: medium or high unknown file-touch risk
singleSessionFallback: If actual parallel execution is unavailable, run group tasks sequentially and then run the integration task.
